creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dag-Erling SmÃ¸rgrav from comment #4)
Oct 10 20:15:14 archon local-unbound[12053]: [12053:0] notice: init module 0: validator
Oct 10 20:15:14 archon local-unbound[12053]: [12053:0] notice: init module 1: iterator

It definitely looks like its starting.  AFter a time it does start working, say like 2 to 3 minutes.

This is the first installation we've done in the FreeBSD Cluster on PowerPC hardware in many years, so there's no "new" behavior or errors.  This is how it behaves (archon.nyi.freebsd.org) right now.

I'll update to the latest -current after the builds are done tonight and see if the behavior continues.
